race.comment: NOBLE STYLE (8) is yet to fill a placing in two runs but has been far from disgraced. Will strip fitter third-up and draws well. Can give this a big shake. THAT'SMONEYBROTHER (2) hasn't made an impression lately despite market confidence but his form to start the prep reads favourably. Willing to give another chance. ANGEL IN BLACK (5) accounted for a maiden field over 1200m at this track last start when fresh from a break. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. Lachlan Neindorf was in the saddle on that occasion and retains the ride. Harder task ahead this time but can measure up. ASTARI (3) got too far back here when resuming two weeks ago but did warm up late. Fitter and will appreciate the added 200m. The 4 kg claim also helps.
